# Qasim Region

**Summary**: The geographic area where the Qusaiba Formation is studied.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] conducted research in the qasim-region to study the local Silurian succession.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] Silurian sedimentary basin

## Formations Present

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] qusaiba-member

## Key Findings From This Location

- Contains a well-preserved section of the Qsaiba Shale with distinct lithofacies and foraminiferal assemblages. ([[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018, p. 1]])
